CustomField.formula: (OOEP_Grant_Total__c + OOLCH_Grant_Total__c + PR100EP_Grant_Total__c + PR100LCH_Grant_Total__c + PR50EP_Grant_Total__c + PR50LCH_Grant_Total__c + SHEP_Grant_Total__c + SHLCH_Grant_Total__c) - Total_Capital_Already_Spent_Upfront__c - Paid_Total_to_Date__c - Adjustment_Amount__c
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Total grant funding requested for transfer to GR bank account
CustomField.label: Total Grant Fund Requested
